title: Cherry — Doorway Rehearsal
slides: you practiced walking in more than actually walking in
stood outside long enough for the doorway to feel public
so now even entering feels like a performance
the fix is not confidence first
it is one smaller rep before the doorway gets loud
Cherry helps you plan that rep and log what actually happened
caption: For the moments where the doorway gets louder than the plan. Cherry is on Google Play.

title: Cherry — Exit Plan Before Arrival
slides: the exit plan started before the plan did
where to stand. when to leave. what excuse to use.
your brain finished escaping before you even arrived
that is why the event keeps feeling bigger every time
Cherry is for practicing one tiny entrance before your body writes the ending
save this before the next invite gets heavier
caption: When the escape route gets planned before the hello. Cherry is on Google Play.

title: Cherry — Shelf Check Hello
slides: you checked the shelf like it had the answer instead of saying hi
not because you needed anything there
because buying three more seconds felt safer than being perceived
that is not rudeness. that is panic buying time.
Cherry helps you rehearse one smaller rep before the aisle becomes a test
caption: For when the aisle becomes a hiding place. Cherry is on Google Play.
